mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN visit_state = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "totalVisited", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN visit_state IN (1, 2, 5, 6) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "totalWaiting" FROM register
employee_id = #{employeeId}

SELECT r.id AS "registerId", r.case_number AS "caseNumber", r.real_name AS "realName", r.gender AS "gender", r.age AS "age", r.visit_date AS "visitDate", r.visit_state AS "visitState", r.noon AS "noon", d.dept_name AS "deptName", e.realname AS "physicianName", ac.chief_complaint AS "chiefComplaint", ac.symptom_duration AS "symptomDuration", ac.history_summary AS "historySummary", ac.allergy_summary AS "allergySummary", ac.medication_summary AS "medicationSummary", ac.ai_summary AS "aiSummary", ac.suggested_exam AS "suggestedExam", CASE WHEN ac.id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS "hasAiConsultation" FROM register r LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = r.deptment_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.id = r.employee_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT * FROM ai_consultation_record acr WHERE acr.register_id = r.id ORDER BY acr.completion_time DESC NULLS LAST, acr.creation_time DESC LIMIT 1 ) ac ON TRUE WHERE r.id = #{registerId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT cr.id FROM check_request cr WHERE cr.register_id = #{registerId} AND (cr.check_result IS NULL OR cr.check_state != '已完成') UNION ALL SELECT ir.id FROM inspection_request ir WHERE ir.register_id = #{registerId} AND (ir.inspection_result IS NULL OR ir.inspection_state != '已完成') ) pending

SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", readme AS "readme", present AS "present", present_treat AS "presentTreat", history AS "history", allergy AS "allergy", physique AS "physique", proposal AS "proposal", preliminary_diagnosis AS "preliminaryDiagnosis", careful AS "careful", diagnosis AS "diagnosis", cure AS "cure" FROM medical_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId}

SELECT d.id AS "id", d.disease_code AS "diseaseCode", d.disease_name AS "diseaseName", d.diseaseicd AS "diseaseIcd", d.disease_category AS "diseaseCategory" FROM medical_record_disease mrd INNER JOIN disease d ON d.id = mrd.disease_id WHERE mrd.medical_record_id = #{medicalRecordId} ORDER BY d.disease_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medical_record_disease (medical_record_id, disease_id) VALUES (#{medicalRecordId}, #{diseaseId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select:
SELECT mt.id AS "id", mt.tech_code AS "techCode", mt.tech_name AS "techName", mt.tech_format AS "techFormat", mt.tech_price AS "techPrice", mt.tech_type AS "techType", mt.price_type AS "priceType", mt.deptment_id AS "deptmentId", d.dept_name AS "deptName" FROM medical_technology mt LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = mt.deptment_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND mt.tech_type = #{techType}
AND (mt.tech_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mt.tech_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY mt.tech_type, mt.tech_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO check_request (register_id, medical_technology_id, check_info, check_position, check_remark) VALUES (#{registerId}, #{medicalTechnologyId}, #{checkInfo}, #{checkPosition}, #{checkRemark})

INSERT INTO inspection_request (register_id, medical_technology_id, inspection_info, inspection_position, inspection_remark) VALUES (#{registerId}, #{medicalTechnologyId}, #{inspectionInfo}, #{inspectionPosition}, #{inspectionRemark})

INSERT INTO disposal_request (register_id, medical_technology_id, disposal_info, disposal_position, disposal_remark) VALUES (#{registerId}, #{medicalTechnologyId}, #{disposalInfo}, #{disposalPosition}, #{disposalRemark})
mapper.select: SELECT cr.id AS "id", mt.tech_name AS "techName", cr.check_position AS "checkPosition", cr.check_result AS "checkResult", cr.check_state AS "checkState", cr.check_time AS "checkTime", cr.check_remark AS "checkRemark", a.risk_level AS "riskLevel", a.analysis_report AS "analysisReport", a.abnormal_indicators AS "abnormalIndicators", a.correlation_analysis AS "correlationAnalysis" FROM check_request cr INNER JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = cr.medical_technology_id LEFT JOIN ai_exam_analysis a ON a.check_request_id = cr.id WHERE cr.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY cr.creation_time DESC, cr.id DESC

SELECT ir.id AS "id", mt.tech_name AS "techName", ir.inspection_position AS "inspectionPosition", ir.inspection_result AS "inspectionResult", ir.inspection_state AS "inspectionState", ir.inspection_time AS "inspectionTime", ir.inspection_remark AS "inspectionRemark", a.risk_level AS "riskLevel", a.analysis_report AS "analysisReport", a.abnormal_indicators AS "abnormalIndicators", a.correlation_analysis AS "correlationAnalysis" FROM inspection_request ir INNER JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = ir.medical_technology_id LEFT JOIN ai_exam_analysis a ON a.inspection_request_id = ir.id WHERE ir.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY ir.creation_time DESC, ir.id DESC

SELECT id AS "id", disease_code AS "diseaseCode", disease_name AS "diseaseName", diseaseicd AS "diseaseIcd", disease_category AS "diseaseCategory" FROM disease
disease_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR disease_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR diseaseicd ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY disease_name LIMIT 50

sql.where:
(status IS NULL OR status = 1)
AND ( drug_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR drug_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mnemonic_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.sql: id AS "id", drug_code AS "drugCode", drug_name AS "drugName", drug_format AS "drugFormat", drug_unit AS "drugUnit", manufacturer AS "manufacturer", drug_dosage AS "drugDosage", drug_type AS "drugType", drug_price AS "drugPrice", mnemonic_code AS "mnemonicCode", COALESCE(stock_quantity, 0) AS "stockQuantity", COALESCE(low_stock_threshold, 20) AS "lowStockThreshold"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM drug_info
ORDER BY drug_name LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drug_info

SELECT id AS "id", drug_code AS "drugCode", drug_name AS "drugName", drug_format AS "drugFormat", drug_unit AS "drugUnit", manufacturer AS "manufacturer", drug_dosage AS "drugDosage", drug_type AS "drugType", drug_price AS "drugPrice", mnemonic_code AS "mnemonicCode", creation_date AS "creationDate", COALESCE(stock_quantity, 0) AS "stockQuantity", COALESCE(low_stock_threshold, 20) AS "lowStockThreshold" FROM drug_info WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prescription (register_id, drug_id, drug_usage, drug_number, diagnosis) VALUES (#{registerId}, #{drugId}, #{drugUsage}, #{drugNumber}, #{diagnosis})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS "id", p.register_id AS "registerId", p.drug_id AS "drugId", d.drug_name AS "drugName", d.drug_format AS "drugFormat", d.drug_unit AS "drugUnit", d.drug_price AS "drugPrice", p.drug_usage AS "drugUsage", p.drug_number AS "drugNumber", p.drug_state AS "drugState", p.creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM prescription p INNER JOIN drug_info d ON d.id = p.drug_id WHERE p.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY p.creation_time DESC, p.id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM prescription WHERE id = #{id} AND drug_state = '未发'
mapper.select: SELECT id AS "id", tech_id AS "techId", tech_name AS "techName", suggest_type AS "suggestType", suggest_reason AS "suggestReason", priority AS "priority", is_adopted AS "isAdopted" FROM ai_exam_suggestion WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY priority ASC, id DESC

SELECT id AS "id", disease_id AS "diseaseId", disease_name AS "diseaseName", recommend_icd AS "recommendIcd", probability AS "probability", risk_level AS "riskLevel", treatment_direction AS "treatmentDirection", diagnosis_basis AS "diagnosisBasis", is_adopted AS "isAdopted", sort_order AS "sortOrder" FROM ai_diagnosis_suggestion WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, probability DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT id AS "reviewId", review_result AS "reviewResult", drug_conflict AS "drugConflict", allergy_risk AS "allergyRisk", duplicate_drug AS "duplicateDrug", dosage_check AS "dosageCheck", risk_score AS "riskScore", risk_details AS "riskDetails", doctor_action AS "doctorAction", review_time AS "reviewTime" FROM ai_prescription_review WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY review_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id AS "registerId", r.case_number AS "caseNumber", r.real_name AS "realName", r.gender AS "gender", r.age AS "age", r.home_address AS "homeAddress", r.visit_state AS "visitState", r.employee_id AS "employeeId", d.dept_name AS "deptName" FROM register r LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = r.deptment_id WHERE r.id = #{registerId}
SELECT employee_id FROM register WHERE id = #{registerId}
SELECT register_id FROM medical_record WHERE id = #{medicalRecordId}

SELECT chief_complaint AS "chiefComplaint", symptom_duration AS "symptomDuration", history_summary AS "historySummary", allergy_summary AS "allergySummary", medication_summary AS "medicationSummary", ai_summary AS "aiSummary", suggested_exam AS "suggestedExam" FROM ai_consultation_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY completion_time DESC NULLS LAST, creation_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT mt.id AS "techId", mt.tech_code AS "techCode", mt.tech_name AS "techName", mt.tech_type AS "techType", COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(mt.ai_category_code), ''), CASE WHEN mt.tech_type = 'inspection' THEN 'lab' ELSE 'general_check' END ) AS "category", mt.tech_price AS "techPrice" FROM medical_technology mt WHERE mt.tech_type IN ('check', 'inspection') ORDER BY mt.tech_type, mt.tech_name

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT cr.register_id AS "registerId", cr.id AS "requestId", cr.medical_technology_id AS "techId", mt.tech_name AS "techName", mt.tech_type AS "techType", CASE WHEN mt.tech_code = 'XJCT' THEN 'imaging_ct_chest' WHEN mt.tech_code = 'TLCT' THEN 'imaging_ct_brain' WHEN mt.tech_type = 'inspection' THEN 'lab' ELSE 'general_check' END AS "category" FROM check_request cr INNER JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = cr.medical_technology_id WHERE cr.register_id = #{registerId} AND (cr.check_result IS NULL OR cr.check_state != '已完成') UNION ALL SELECT ir.register_id AS "registerId", ir.id AS "requestId", ir.medical_technology_id AS "techId", mt.tech_name AS "techName", mt.tech_type AS "techType", CASE WHEN mt.tech_code = 'XJCT' THEN 'imaging_ct_chest' WHEN mt.tech_code = 'TLCT' THEN 'imaging_ct_brain' WHEN mt.tech_type = 'inspection' THEN 'lab' ELSE 'general_check' END AS "category" FROM inspection_request ir INNER JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = ir.medical_technology_id WHERE ir.register_id = #{registerId} AND (ir.inspection_result IS NULL OR ir.inspection_state != '已完成') ) pending ORDER BY "techType", "techName"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_exam_suggestion (register_id, tech_id, tech_name, suggest_type, suggest_reason, priority, model_id) VALUES (#{registerId}, #{techId}, #{techName}, #{suggestType}, #{suggestReason}, #{priority}, #{modelId})
mapper.select: SELECT id AS "id", analysis_type AS "analysisType", original_result AS "originalResult", abnormal_indicators AS "abnormalIndicators", risk_level AS "riskLevel", analysis_report AS "analysisReport", correlation_analysis AS "correlationAnalysis" FROM ai_exam_analysis WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY analysis_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", drug_id AS "drugId", drug_name AS "drugName", recommend_usage AS "recommendUsage", recommend_quantity AS "recommendQuantity", confidence AS "confidence", recommendation_basis AS "recommendationBasis", caution_notes AS "cautionNotes", is_adopted AS "isAdopted", sort_order AS "sortOrder", model_id AS "modelId", creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM ai_drug_suggestion WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, confidence DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", source_type AS "sourceType", ai_diagnosis AS "aiDiagnosis", model_id AS "modelId", doctor_modification AS "doctorModification", generation_time AS "generationTime" FROM ai_medical_record_log WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND source_type = #{sourceType} ORDER BY generation_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
